calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
